MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin Ford for the Administrator.

Mr. Ford stated that he had the Substitution of Attorney signed by the Adminstrator, but that Ms. Traeg had not responded. The Court directed Mr. Ford to file the Substitution of Attorney. The matter was continued to September 2, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy K. Sandberg.
